Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters

Class AutoRewriterImpl

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.DefaultRewriter
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.AbstractRewriterImpl
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.PredicateSimplifier
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.AutoRewriterImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFormulaRewriter, IFormulaRewriter2
Direct Known Subclasses:
RemoveInclusionRewriterImpl, RemoveInclusionUniversalRewriterImpl, RemoveNegationRewriterImpl, StrictInclusionRewriterImpl
public class AutoRewriterImpl extends PredicateSimplifier
Basic automated rewriter for the Event-B sequent prover.
